collections.name: Ferdy Frens
collections.description:
We all have friends. But very few of us have Frens.

Ferdy Frens is a collection for those who don’t take themselves too seriously. Folks who understand, but want you to explain what you meant just in case. Folks who may or may not have missed the CAUTION: WET FLOOR sign once or twice and taken a spill. Folks who want to own something that other people think might be hideous even though those people are wrong because shut up I like it. I’m not crying, you’re crying.

You know why you’re here. And we’re happy to have you. Right this way, my fren.

collections.name: S.E.M. Capsules
collections.description:
S.E.M. (Stable Exotic Matter) Capsules are the most important resource in the BloodLoop narrative universe. They represent the only remaining source of Exotic Energy in the universe and are the main reason for the struggle between the Four Factions. Owning a Capsules is equivalent to possessing a source of infinite wealth, and infinite opportunities.

$BLS Token Airdrop: Discover the history of BloodLoop, unlock mysteries, and uncover secrets to earn points and help your faction.

Accumulated points will give you access to a 1,000,000 BLS airdrop pool.

collections.name: Innermost by Brian Morris
collections.description: Innermost by Brian Morris is a visual exploration of ideas, feelings and experiences that bring people together. Each piece captures a feeling difficult to put into words, visualizing the intangible sensations inside all of us. Feelings which are amplified when felt with another person.The Innermost collection evolved from Brian’s ongoing study of glass profiles filled with a myriad of ideas. What began as a single glass silhouette become a playground for experimenting without the goal to ever be “complete”. Free of limitations or expectations, Brian found new looks within his signature See-Thru Surrealism. The glass forms of Innermost expand on the key themes he found within this ongoing pursuit. Much like the study that lead to this work, the collection centers around consistent forms within different looks, and consistent looks in different forms.

collections.name: Assetha
collections.description: Assetha world is a gruesome one, ruled by tech firms. Its characters exist on a cyberpunk world, lawless subculture of an oppressive society. Are you prepared to discover your own hero, create their own story and become one with them?

collections.name: Cuddle Fish
collections.description: Cuddle Fish is a Non-Generative 1:1 Collection of 1000 "Cuddle Fish". Each Cuddle Fish represents Artist and Co-Founder of Campfire, Josh Hughes' interest in the anthropomorphic figure as representation of projected self through the use as online profile pictures (PfP). This collection explores the human condition of adoption of symbol, brand, and personal identity of online culture and decentralized networks. Josh Hughes takes personal interest in the idea of PfPs as Kayfabe, or the extension of personality where as the adoption of image has echoed as a recurring theme thought out human history.

collections.name: BabySkullz
collections.description:
Owning a BabySkullz NFT grants you access to [Skullz.City](https://www.skullz.city), The Original Verse, a place where we **experiment** and **innovate** in Web3. 

The utility of our BabySkullz is constantly evolving as they are the very first inhabitants of Skullz City. They play one of the most important role in the city as we call their holderz, the Believerz. They define what comes next in our world and are rewarded for their hard work building the city.

Learn more about our project and utility through [Our Whitepaper](https://docs.madskullz.io)

Discover our other collections and learn more on [MadSkullz.io](https://www.madskullz.io)

collections.name: WyndBlast NFT
collections.description:
One of a Kind Multiplayer Strategy Auto-Battler Play and Earn on #Avalanche Blockchain ⚔️🐉🔥

There are various in-game activities, including breeding, recruiting, forging, PVE & PVP. We introduce three kinds of digital assets (The wynd, The rider, and the equipment). That is Because wyndblast is the first game we will build around Chronica Sola Verse. After WyndBlast has successfully stable and matured, we will introduce another 'verse' or play, and the player can use the same asset used in WyndBlast. That is why we need to ensure that the digital assets available are varied enough to fulfill this goal. The critical difference between WyndBlast and a traditional game is that Blockchain economic design unlocks the ability to have complex player-owned economies and reward players who can reach advanced skill levels. Players can have fun and work towards ambitious goals while simultaneously earning potential resources that

collections.name: FunnelHeads
collections.description: Who are the Funnelheads? They were born in an unknown place, on an unknown date. We have no clue about how they multiple, what they eat. It's a mystery where they take shelter, how they stay healthy. It's impossible to trace the records of their finger prints or their radiology results. Because they did not partake in any of these activities. Nobody cared about any of this... They just want to live among us, to walk the same streets as us, to talk about the same things as us, to fall in love with the same person as us. They need validation and acceptance just like the rest of us. But they are not the type to be validated or accepted. They are easy to differentiate from the rest of us, but they think otherwise. They are masters of shapeshifting, but you could still recoginize them no matter what shape they are in. They could be turned into weapons in the wrong hands, but to this date, no wrong hand wanted to turn them into weapons.

collections.name: Firat NFTs Collection
collections.description: Fırat keeps reigning as the most famous comics hero of Turkey since he came into our lives in 2007. The cartoonish life of this kid, who has a language and a world-view of his own, has glimpses of everybody's childhood one way or the other. Fırat has an answer to every situation he finds himself in. He suffers no traumas whatsoever. He never cries, even if he falls. He finds joy in falling in a cool manner. He can imagine block-buster features with rockets exploding and cars crashing one another with a slipper or a triple socket. His only concern is to grow up fast, when he finally does, he imagines he will be the coolest person on the planet. Fırat has 5 published books up to now, each of them a best seller. He now multiplies in NFT.

collections.name: Conscious Lines by Gabe Weis
collections.description: Conscious Lines represents 16 years of meetings, 16 years of knowing that I had art in me that needed to get out. I have always had a deep connection to these works as they represent my journey from community organizer to one of the top selling NFT artists in the world. For this collection I have used my stream-of-consciousness approach to share my history of creating visual jazz for the Avalanche ecosystem. Most of These are ink drawings on nice archival paper that I carried with me at all times for any meeting I was in. When I draw I aim to make artifacts that are both universal and timeless. Was it found in a cave from 10,000 years ago, or from a human/alien hybrid 10,000 years from now? Maybe somewhere in between…

collections.name: Snail Trail
collections.description:
Snail Trail is an NFT based auto racing game where players place their Snails in competitive races and win rewards. Players can own, optimize, reproduce, and race with their Snails.
 
Every Snail belongs to one of five families. Based on their genetics, they have unique traits and racing preferences that players can get to know better to develop tactics and strategies that will improve their performance—and maximize reward earnings. A Snail’s performance also depends on the racing track environment. The game’s reproduction systems allow players to mint more Snails and compete in more races.

collections.name: Particle_Love_Is_In_The_Air
collections.description: Love is in the Air is a masterpiece that epitomizes the unparalleled creative insurgency of Banksy’s oeuvre. Characterised by its recognisable subject, graphic force and visual directness, this iconic work has helped cement Banksy’s place as an a decisive political gadfly for our time. Particle acquired the piece at auction on 5/13/2021 and the work was subsequently donated to the non-profit Particle Foundation where the piece will remain in perpetuity. Love is in the Air is the first piece offered by Particle representing a peaceful revolution, changing the narrative of ownership, and enabling anyone to collect, experience, and enjoy the masterpiece.
